scenario.name: RTP Echo pause / start test UAC
scenario.send:
NOTIFY sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]; transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sip:reddy2@10.133.48.149:5060 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,REFER,NOTIFY,CANCEL,INFO,SUBSCRIBE,UPDATE,OPTIONS Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] NOTIFY Contact: sip:[field1]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport] Subscription-State: active Supported: timer,replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Event: message-summary Content-Type: application/simple-message-summary Content-Length: [len]
Messages-Waiting: yes Message-Account: sip:reddy2@10.133.48.149:5060
